title: Lisbon, in Spring
narrative: We came for the pastéis and stayed for the light. Somewhere between the tram bells and the tiled hills, four days became the kind of memory a family retells for decades.

userPins.name: Time Out Market
userPins.note: Best bifana of the whole trip.

slides.caption: First morning over the Alfama rooftops.
slides.why: Chosen as the opening — it sets the light the whole trip lived in.

slides.caption: Tram 28, exactly as crowded as promised.
slides.why: A standalone moment — the most retold story of the trip deserves its own slide.

slides.caption: A morning wandering the tiled hills.
slides.why: Two views of the same neighborhood — stronger together than apart.

slides.caption: Six pastéis de nata. None survived.
slides.why: Food photos carry memory — this one had everyone's hands in frame.

slides.caption: Cabo da Roca — the edge of the continent.
slides.why: The only photo where everyone is looking at the same horizon.

slides.caption: Last night, fado drifting up the street.
slides.why: A closing image — quieter than the rest, the way trips actually end.
